attributes.action: No to drinking in Parliament whilst working!!
attributes.additional_details:
Some people may suffer fom an Impaired judgement whilst drinking 

No other workforce would accept this & they rightly should not
attributes.background: No drinking alcohol whilst working in parliament especially whilst voting on important issues!

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Ban the sale and consumption of alcohol in House of Commons venues
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/768417
